title: IDOR in invoice endpoint leaks customer billing data
summary: An authenticated user can access another account invoice by changing invoice_id.

mitre_attack.notes: Exploitation occurs through external exposed application functionality.

reproduction.steps:
1. Login as low-privileged user.
2. Request GET /v1/invoices/1001.
3. Change ID to another tenant invoice and resend.
4. Observe unauthorized invoice data in response.

business_impact.statement: Unauthorized cross-tenant access to sensitive billing data can create regulatory, legal, and trust impact.

validation.notes: Control request with owned invoice succeeded and cross-tenant request exposed unauthorized data.

remediation: Enforce object ownership authorization on every invoice access path and add authorization unit/integration tests.
